tools.name: health
tools.description: Health check. Returns server status and optional echo.

tools.name: reconcile_transactions
tools.description: Match bank statement lines against unreconciled Xero transactions. Returns confidence-scored matches (>=0.8 matched, 0.5-0.8 suggested, <0.5 unmatched).

tools.name: confirm_reconciliation
tools.description: Apply confirmed reconciliation matches to Xero. Marks matched bank transactions as reconciled.

tools.name: categorise_expenses
tools.description: Suggest Portuguese tax categories for uncategorised Xero expenses. Returns category, VAT tier, deductibility, and VAT breakdown per transaction.

tools.name: apply_categories
tools.description: Apply confirmed Portuguese tax categories to Xero transactions. Updates AccountCode and TaxType.

tools.name: calculate_vat
tools.description: Calculate Portuguese VAT for a given amount, category, and region. Supports Mainland, Azores, and Madeira rates. Detects intra-community B2B reverse charge.

tools.name: draft_invoice
tools.description: Create a DRAFT invoice in Xero with VAT preview. Returns line totals and tax amounts for review before sending.

tools.name: send_invoice
tools.description: Authorise a DRAFT invoice and email it to the contact via Xero. Two-step: sets status to AUTHORISED then triggers email.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a financial report: P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow (indirect method from balance sheet deltas), or VAT Summary with Portuguese SAF-T filing hints.
